final:
module dvfs_controller(  
    input [1:0] temperature,  
    output reg [1:0] obf_frequency  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (temperature)  
            2'b00: obf_frequency = 2'b00; // Low temperature -> Low obf_frequency  
            2'b01: obf_frequency = 2'b01; // Medium temperature -> Medium obf_frequency  
            2'b10: obf_frequency = 2'b10; // High temperature -> High obf_frequency  
            2'b11: obf_frequency = 2'b11; // Very high temperature -> Maximum obf_frequency  
            default: obf_frequency = 2'b00; // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
